item.title: It's so legal.
item.description: I've personally been responsible for two local politicians failing their races. Like it or not, the front line in the culture war is Facebook. That's where your shitty aunt Kathy gets all her opinions from. Local politicians also rely almost entirely on facebook and other social media for their campaigns. Facebook is where your idiot neighbors congregate *publicly*, which means that's where they're vulnerable to public opinion. You want to get in the fight? Get local. Prevent the spread. Stop them before their ambitions grow.

item.title: Archie Bunker, a character who really shows the life of a racist
item.description: “All in the Family” was an amazing show in the 70s, the central character of which is a major bigot. As explained here by the actor played him, Carroll O’Connor, they enjoyed making people laugh but worried that viewers missed the major point: that racists are people who have been passed over by life and are thoroughly miserable people.
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: GovBrief Today #243
item.description: You know that panicked feeling when you're sprinting through a store at closing time? That's today's news. Thirty-one stories dropped as the government shut down. All of the generals worldwide were summoned for loyalty tests, the president posted racist deepfakes twice, journalists were attacked by ICE two days in a row, and a judge ruling against Trump was threatened. While we scrambled to keep up, they grabbed their grift on the way out: lithium mining stakes, crypto billionaires choosing their regulators, and a $66 million gift from Florida to Trump so he can park his gift jet from Qatar next to Mar-a-Lago. Pick one story from today. Read it completely. Share it with someone who needs to see it. That is how we fight back when they're counting on exhaustion. And don't leave truth to the algorithm. Our free and private nightly email arms you with images, data, and quotes so you can see it all for yourself. Add your email at govbrief dot today or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #govbrieftoday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-unconstitutional-first-amendment [2] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-posts-racist-meme [3] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-agents-journalists-nyc [4] https://go.govbrief.today/feds-sue-protesters-synagogue [5] https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-nz-gun-gift [6] https://go.govbrief.today/bukele-us-ambassador-shield [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-pfizer-rx-prices [8] https://go.govbrief.today/fairfax-schools-probe-abortion [9] https://go.govbrief.today/title-ix-trans-minnesota [10] https://go.govbrief.today/eeoc-discrimination-tool-shelved [11] https://go.govbrief.today/chantilly-ice-conditions-improving [12] https://go.govbrief.today/us-iran-deportation [13] https://go.govbrief.today/us-lithium-americas-stake [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gov-shutdown-trump-crisis [15] https://go.govbrief.today/ftc-zillow-redfin-suit [16] https://go.govbrief.today/bls-nominee-withdrawn [17] https://go.govbrief.today/landry-requests-guard-louisiana [18] https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-trump-military-gathering [19] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-rules-chattah-ineligible [20] https://go.govbrief.today/senate-social-security-age [21] https://go.govbrief.today/mn-immigration-fraud-claimed [22] https://go.govbrief.today/texas-ice-victim-dies [23] https://go.govbrief.today/superintendent-roberts-resigns-iowa [24] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-says-harvard-deal [25] https://go.govbrief.today/house-girjalva-swearing-in [26] https://go.govbrief.today/hud-shutdown-blame-banner [27] https://go.govbrief.today/emails-trump-no-blame [28] https://go.govbrief.today/florida-trump-library-miami [29] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-inspector-general-council [30] https://go.govbrief.today/quintenz-cftc-nomination-withdrawal [31] https://go.govbrief.today/ifpte-union-wins-victory Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1481 (ornithologists are not okay)
item.description:
Let's get this bread. I miss being able to afford sandwiches. I'm so tired of rice.
Just. No.
Today's entry is late because I've been on hold and on the phone and fighting the Arizona DES website to get food stamps and find out what my health care plan from them is. Managed to access the food stamp thing where I'll be getting a whopping $200 a month, but it looks like ill need to make yet another call to be on hold to get a replacement health care card, hooray.
I really hoped to go sit on my mountain and watch birds and scream at the abyss today, but it's getting late for that; Pippin is getting his wing feathers trimmed at 1:30. Won't have time to go up the mountain and scream long enough to relieve any stress, sadly.
No, I assure you Stu, we are not okay.
Yes.
Someone suggested donating plasma; how do i go about doing that? I don't need blood, i'm hardly using mine anyway.
This is also me with sciences and geology and birds and history and and and and
Yeah this is just... outside.
Dinosaur Fan1000 has an absolute shit take here. Iguanadon is a great pick. Its like, one of the only three that span the whole history of Paleontology as a science and it has changed so much and it details those shifts so beautifully, as demonstrated in the latest of the Dinosauria video series by David Arnesby.
I, for one, would welcome our new Kaiju Turkey overlords because they would at least release the Epstein files.
I honestly am not sure how I feel about this.
It is said Yellow Rails sound like two rocks being clicked together.
My autosiphon for bottling and racking mead broke yesterday, so thats also fun times.
Penguin as a word originally referred to the Great Auk, which we exterminated.
Another notoriously cryptic AF bird.
I wish we were more like Nepal.
Rules for you, not for me.
@DiscountMentat strikes again
Okay, so I really like Snowy Owls. I've only seen one before, ever, and it was like a half mile away.
Just put me in front of that Squad anyway.
Pippin tax Today's message from Pippin: "PIPPIN! what you doing?" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.dc:creator: JebidiahBeetus

item.title: Trying (and failing) to hold it together
item.description:
I got news today that I’m “Medically Disqualified for Policy Reasons” from doing my job for no other reason than having a diagnosis of Gender Dysphoria. In another world, that would be blatant discrimination and I’d have some kind of recourse. Not here, not anymore. ? I have no regrets for coming to terms with my true self and coming out as a trans woman. I regret this nightmare that we live in. I personally believe that this administration is fully devoted to only one cause: trying to cause as much pain and suffering as possible to any group of people that they dislike. Immigrants, LGBTQ, women, anyone without white skin, poor people who just want healthcare and a living wage. I just don’t think I can take it anymore. I just feel broken. I’m trying to not go to the emergency room for mental health reasons. I’m trying to fight their labeling that I’m unfit and mentally unwell it’s pushed me to the point where I feel like they’re right. It’s artificial and without the constant, institutional discrimination, I wouldn’t be this way but I am and it’s finally breaking me. :,(
I’m going to snuggle my cat and hopefully cry myself to sleep. I just want this nightmare to end if only for a few hours. Edit: Thank you all for your support, I’m at the hospital to try and get some help. Don’t know what they’re going to be able to do but it’s better than crying in my office.
item.dc:creator: MindOverMana
